overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, wet reflective pavement, and modern architecture. The character navigates from an open sidewalk through a narrow passage into a plaza and then under an elevated overpass, with ambient pedestrian activity and holographic advertisements throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to street barriers, passing advertising kiosks and palm trees

purple neon sign with green text reading HOTEL
metal railings separating sidewalk from the street
tropical trees lining the street edge
illuminated digital billboard structure with human figure advertisement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city sidewalk at night, illuminated by vibrant red neon holograms and a purple hotel sign. The character walks forward along concrete pavement bordered by metal street barriers, with palm trees visible on the right and sparse pedestrian activity ahead.

events.description: enters narrow covered passage between large concrete buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark narrow corridor between building columns

entered.detail: massive concrete structural pillars flanking the passage
shadowed corridor leading to lit exit ahead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow passage between massive building columns, transitioning from the open neon-lit street to an enclosed corridor. The lighting drops significantly as the camera moves toward a bright exit visible at the far end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with modern architecture

slight turn to the right while navigating around planters

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, navigating around concrete planters and benches

large glowing advertisement screen mounted on the building facade
rectangular raised beds containing palm trees and vegetation
concrete seating areas with people resting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the passage, the scene opens into a spacious urban plaza with a large modern office building dominating the right side. The character walks across wet paved tiles, passing concrete planters with palm trees and benches where people are seated, while a tall skyscraper becomes visible in the distance.

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath elevated overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass, passing by seated pedestrians and digital advertising screens

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench looking at a device

entered.detail: underside of elevated highway or monorail structure forming a roof
long continuous fluorescent light strips running along the ceiling
illuminated wall-mounted displays showing video advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long covered walkway beneath an elevated overpass, illuminated by linear ceiling lights. The environment features digital advertising screens on the walls, concrete planters with palm trees, and benches where pedestrians sit, creating a sheltered urban corridor distinct from the open plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit sidewalk through a restrictive corridor and into a sprawling urban complex. It begins on a wet city street illuminated by red holograms and a purple hotel sign, moving past metal barriers and palm trees. As the character advances, the open street gives way to a dark, narrow passage between massive building columns, where the lighting drops sharply before drawing the camera toward a bright exit. The scene then expands into a spacious urban plaza featuring wet paved tiles and a dominating modern office building, with a distant skyscraper emerging as the character passes concrete planters and seated pedestrians. Finally, the movement shifts from the open plaza into a sheltered walkway beneath an elevated overpass, where linear ceiling lights and digital advertising screens line the walls of the covered corridor.
